'''ân-s-r''' ('''nasara''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quinella|quinella]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-s-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quinella|quinella]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-s-r
|-
! Lemma
| nasara
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nasarithi|nasarithi]] || [[word:nasariji|nasariji]] || [[word:nasarishi|nasarishi]] || [[word:nasari|nasari]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nasaruthuth|nasaruthuth]] || [[word:nasarujuj|nasarujuj]] || [[word:nasarushush|nasarushush]] || [[word:nasar|nasar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nasaruthu|nasaruthu]] || [[word:nasaruju|nasaruju]] || [[word:nasarushu|nasarushu]] || [[word:nasaru|nasaru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nasarufuth|nasarufuth]] || [[word:nasarufuj|nasarufuj]] || [[word:nasarufush|nasarufush]] || [[word:nasaruf|nasaruf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nasarethe|nasarethe]] || [[word:nasareje|nasareje]] || [[word:nasareshe|nasareshe]] || [[word:nasare|nasare]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nasarothoth|nasarothoth]] || [[word:nasarojoj|nasarojoj]] || [[word:nasaroshosh|nasaroshosh]] || [[word:nasar|nasar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nasarotho|nasarotho]] || [[word:nasarojo|nasarojo]] || [[word:nasarosho|nasarosho]] || [[word:nasaro|nasaro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nasarofoth|nasarofoth]] || [[word:nasarofoj|nasarofoj]] || [[word:nasarofosh|nasarofosh]] || [[word:nasarof|nasarof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nasarĂŠthĂŠ|nasarĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:nasarĂŠjĂŠ|nasarĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:nasarĂŠshĂŠ|nasarĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:nasarĂŠ|nasarĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nasarathath|nasarathath]] || [[word:nasarajaj|nasarajaj]] || [[word:nasarashash|nasarashash]] || [[word:nasar|nasar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nasaratha|nasaratha]] || [[word:nasaraja|nasaraja]] || [[word:nasarasha|nasarasha]] || [[word:nasara|nasara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nasarafath|nasarafath]] || [[word:nasarafaj|nasarafaj]] || [[word:nasarafash|nasarafash]] || [[word:nasaraf|nasaraf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:nasarasha|nasarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gonasarasha|gonasarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokinasarasha|gokinasarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:nasarnĂŒsha|nasarnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gonasarnknĂŒsha|gonasarnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokinasarnĂŒsha|gokinasarnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nasarshĂ«sha|nasarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonasarnkshĂ«sha|gonasarnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinasarshĂ«sha|gokinasarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nasarrosha|nasarrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonasarnkrosha|gonasarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinasarrosha|gokinasarrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nasarmusha|nasarmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gonasarnkmusha|gonasarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinasarmusha|gokinasarmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:nasarsherasha|nasarsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gonasarnksherasha|gonasarnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokinasarsherasha|gokinasarsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:nasarngasha|nasarngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gonasarnkngasha|gonasarnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokinasarngasha|gokinasarngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nasaryasha|nasaryasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gonasarnkyasha|gonasarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokinasaryasha|gokinasaryasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:nasaryamasha|nasaryamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gonasarnkyamasha|gonasarnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokinasaryamasha|gokinasaryamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:nasarnĂŒshĂ«sha|nasarnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonasarnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gonasarnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinasarnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokinasarnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nasarnĂŒrosha|nasarnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonasarnknĂŒrosha|gonasarnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinasarnĂŒrosha|gokinasarnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nasarnĂŒmusha|nasarnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonasarnknĂŒmusha|gonasarnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinasarnĂŒmusha|gokinasarnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:nasarshĂ«nĂŒsha|nasarshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonasarnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gonasarnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinasarshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokinasarshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nasarshĂ«rosha|nasarshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonasarnkshĂ«rosha|gonasarnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinasarshĂ«rosha|gokinasarshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nasarshĂ«musha|nasarshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonasarnkshĂ«musha|gonasarnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinasarshĂ«musha|gokinasarshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:nasarronĂŒsha|nasarronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonasarnkronĂŒsha|gonasarnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinasarronĂŒsha|gokinasarronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:nasarroshĂ«sha|nasarroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonasarnkroshĂ«sha|gonasarnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinasarroshĂ«sha|gokinasarroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nasarromusha|nasarromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonasarnkromusha|gonasarnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinasarromusha|gokinasarromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:nasarmunĂŒsha|nasarmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonasarnkmunĂŒsha|gonasarnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinasarmunĂŒsha|gokinasarmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:nasarmushĂ«sha|nasarmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonasarnkmushĂ«sha|gonasarnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinasarmushĂ«sha|gokinasarmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nasarmurosha|nasarmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonasarnkmurosha|gonasarnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinasarmurosha|gokinasarmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:nasar|nasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŠsĂŠr|nĂŠsĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:honasar|honasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:honĂŠsĂŠr|honĂŠsĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonasar|hohonasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonĂŠsĂŠr|hohonĂŠsĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒnasar|nĂŒnasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŠsĂŠr|nĂŒnĂŠsĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒnasar|nĂŒnĂŒnasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒnĂŠsĂŠr|nĂŒnĂŒnĂŠsĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻnasar|nĂŻnasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŠsĂŠr|nĂŻnĂŠsĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻnasar|nĂŻnĂŻnasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻnĂŠsĂŠr|nĂŻnĂŻnĂŠsĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lunasar|lunasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lunĂŠsĂŠr|lunĂŠsĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunasar|lulunasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunĂŠsĂŠr|lulunĂŠsĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:linasar|linasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:linĂŠsĂŠr|linĂŠsĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinasar|lilinasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinĂŠsĂŠr|lilinĂŠsĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:konasar|konasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:konĂŠsĂŠr|konĂŠsĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonasar|kokonasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonĂŠsĂŠr|kokonĂŠsĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kenasar|kenasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kenĂŠsĂŠr|kenĂŠsĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenasar|kekenasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenĂŠsĂŠr|kekenĂŠsĂŠr]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
